name: harus
description: Skills, agents, and standards for AI-assisted software engineering: orchestration, development cycles, and product planning.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Core behavioral standards: orchestration rules, dispatch protocols, doubt-resolution hierarchy, file limits, agent delegation, memory management, and verification gates.

plugins.name: dev-team
plugins.description: Development team standards: gate-based dev cycles, TDD enforcement, code review protocols, and quality gates for backend and frontend workflows.

plugins.name: pm-team
plugins.description: Product planning standards: structured pre-dev workflows, requirements gathering, delivery planning, task decomposition, and roadmap generation.
